Ntc Of Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

David Julian Cook, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, BERKELEY FARMS, LLC, a California limited liability company.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CAFFINO, ICN., a California corporation.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Declaration of Gina Salido and exhibits attached admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $68,311.49
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $10,047.27
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $483.56
Total Judgment in the amount of $79,842.32
Judgment signed in open court.

Off Calendar Jun-13-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID J. COOK, TEL. NO. 989-4730 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF BERKELEY FARMS LLC.'S Application And Hearing For Right Attach Order (as to Caffino, Incorporated) IS GRANTED. The applicant provided the court at the hearing, with a valid proof of service, indicative of statutorily suffient notice and service. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
